---
title: "Poster"
page-layout: custom
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<div class="gb-home">
  <section class="gb-beat" style="padding-top:2rem;">
    <div class="gb-beat-inner" style="max-width:1100px; margin:0 auto;">
      <div class="gb-label">VAST Challenge 2026 &middot; Mini-Challenge 1 &middot; Group 9</div>
      <h2 class="gb-beat-head">The project poster</h2>
      <p class="gb-beat-text">The whole investigation on a single ISO A1 page, the case, the approach, the four investigative views, the verdict, and where the work goes next.</p>
      <figure style="margin:1.5rem 0 0;">
        <img src="images/GLASSBOX_A1_poster.jpg"
             alt="GLASSBOX project poster, a forensic console for auditing how AI oversight quietly fails, covering the TenantThread embargo breach case, the approach, the results across four views, the verdict, and future work."
             style="width:100%; height:auto; display:block; border:1px solid rgba(28,43,51,0.12); border-radius:10px;">
      </figure>
      <div class="gb-cta-row" style="margin-top:1.5rem;">
        <a href="images/GLASSBOX_A1_poster.jpg" target="_blank" class="gb-btn gb-btn-primary">Open the full resolution poster</a>
        <a href="https://zexinchen.shinyapps.io/shiny/" target="_blank" class="gb-btn gb-btn-ghost">Launch the GLASSBOX app</a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>
</div>
```
